CustomField.formula:
IF(OR( Development_address__r.Id="a0Jo000000LLwRj", Development_address__r.Id="a0Jo000000LLwRP", Development_address__r.Id="a0Jo000000LKqIJ", Development_address__r.Id="a0Jo000000mohxj", Development_address__r.Id="a0J1N00001hysKY", Development_address__r.Id="a0J1N00001fB67S", Development_address__r.Id="a0J1N00001f9qcj", Development_address__r.Id="a0J1N00001a7UtA", Development_address__r.Id="a0J1N00001gCHdA"),"- Non CGP&H Lottery Number" &BR(), "") &
IF(TEXT(Development_address__r.Local_Preference__c) = "Yes", "- Local Preference" & BR(), "") &
IF(Development_address__r.Optional_Veterans_Prefernce__c = TRUE, "- Veterans' Preference" & BR(), "") &
IF(OR( Development_address__r.Id="a0Jo0000003816M", Development_address__r.Id="a0Jo0000003815v"),"- Email Development When the Property is Listed (See Special Posting Circumstances Article)" &BR(), "") &
IF(HOMEtracker__Current_HOA_Condo_Fees__c > 0, "- Email HOA When the Property is Listed (See Special Posting Circumstances Article)", "")
CustomField.label: Special Circumstances
